title: Natural Disasters
description: From raging tornadoes and earthquakes to volcanic eruptions and floods. Where nature itself is your greatest enemy.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cba05abd30ad55bc9d0d13f8b4402f993ff5770.png)

Brace yourself for a world where nature itself is your greatest enemy. 

Natural Disasters ModPack turns Minecraft into a thrilling challenge by introducing realistic natural disasters, including; 

- Earthquakes
- Tsunamis 
- Tornadoes 
- Meteor strikes
- Droughts
- Black holes

These events occur randomly, transforming the world and creating unpredictable challenges for survival and adventure.
